amp-winoff v5.0.1 - Passed - Package Tests Results

PUH-BrianMartell Information analogy as snow-footprint photo is a perfect illustration of PUH vision. The pristine snow field is the undisturbed E₈ lattice substrate. Each footprint is an irreversible imprint left by your foot (a macroscopic gravity wave created by the quantum effect in microtubules during conscious walking). The path you and your dog naturally chose is the lowest-energy route — the path of least resistance through the snow. In PUH this scales exactly to the quantum level: •  Consciousness in microtubules produces a tiny gravity wave (spin-2 tension ripple) that propagates through the E₈ lattice. •  The wave leaves a permanent “footprint” — a localized strain gradient that stores the information of the thought or choice. •  Future information (or photons) naturally follows these pre-existing low-energy paths, exactly like you and your dog choosing the easiest snow route. This reframes the double-slit experiment: the “which-path” information is not mysteriously erased
